case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. CARMEN ISABEL LAMA REYES

docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00); REMARKS: SERVED BY CLERK - GABRIEL MAYORGA SERVED FEB-14-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAMA REYES, CARMEN ISABEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT CARMEN ISABEL LAMA REYES IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A DISMISSAL AS THE CASE HAS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSN OVERTON; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAMA REYES, CARMEN ISABEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-05-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROLALES. DEFENDANT CARMEN ISABEL LAMA REYES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
